_note: 3D isometric icon set for the 'How the AI works' orbit. Transparent PNG via gpt-image-1.5. One consistent style across all six.
style_suffix: Rendered as a single 3D isometric app icon, smooth rounded geometry, soft matte and subtle glossy surfaces, cobalt blue and clean white with a small warm amber highlight, gentle studio lighting, soft contact shadow, centered, floating on a fully transparent background. Consistent style, modern and premium. No text, no letters, no words, no background, one object only.

images.prompt: A 3D isometric icon of an open catalog booklet with a small price tag, representing a company's services and pricing.
A 3D isometric icon of a glossy map location pin standing on a small circular base, representing a service area.
A 3D isometric icon of a calendar with a single checkmark on it, representing live scheduling.
A 3D isometric icon of a rounded shield with an exclamation mark, representing emergency escalation and priority routing.
A 3D isometric icon of a rounded microphone with a small sound wave beside it, representing a natural human voice.
A 3D isometric icon of a closed padlock combined with a shield, representing encryption and privacy.
